headline: Mastering Claude Code Through Structured Modular Workflows
lede: Moving beyond basic prompting requires a rigorous approach to agentic engineering. This ten-module curriculum provides the architectural diagrams and template libraries necessary to transform your development environment into an automated, multi-agent command center.

headline: High-Fidelity Voice Synthesis at Ultra-Low Frame Rates
lede: VibeVoice challenges the current standard for speech tokenization by operating at a lean 7.5 Hz. This research framework prioritizes long-form coherence, enabling the generation of hour-long audio sequences with minimal computational overhead.

headline: Orchestrating Autonomous Development Teams With Oh-My-Claudecode
lede: Building complex software demands a team-first approach, even when your team consists of LLMs. This orchestration framework implements a persistent pipeline that manages planning, execution, and verification within a unified terminal workspace.

headline: Standardizing Expert Patterns for Agentic Development
lede: As AI-assisted coding matures, the need for standardized context management becomes paramount. This collection aggregates field-tested configurations and subagent strategies to help engineers maintain consistent, high-quality output across their projects.

headline: Deploying Self-Improving AI Agents Across Distributed Environments
lede: The Hermes Agent framework provides a robust foundation for persistent AI assistance that evolves with the user. By decoupling the agent's memory and skill acquisition from specific infrastructure, this system ensures reliable performance from local VPS setups to cloud clusters.

headline: Superpowers Standardizes Engineering Protocols for AI Development
lede: Relying on ad-hoc LLM responses often introduces volatility into the codebase. Superpowers enforces a strict Socratic workflow, embedding professional engineering discipline into the agent’s execution cycle to ensure every commit meets high-standard requirements.

headline: Optimizing Agent Performance Through Iterative Reinforcement Learning
lede: Training friction remains a primary bottleneck for teams scaling autonomous agents. Agent Lightning offers a lightweight tracer that captures and optimizes tool calls and prompts, allowing for iterative performance gains without requiring architectural overhauls.

headline: Transforming Complex Visual Documents Into Structured LLM Data
lede: High-performance RAG pipelines require accurate extraction from the messiest of visual formats. PaddleOCR provides the recognition models necessary to convert warped and skewed documentation into the structured JSON required for advanced AI reasoning.

headline: Modular Engineering Skills for Apple Platform Development
lede: Swift concurrency and UI maintenance require specialized attention that general-purpose models often lack. These modular, swappable agent skills empower iOS developers to automate bug hunts and refactoring efforts with precise, Apple-centric logic.

headline: Automating Digital Footprint Reconnaissance via CLI
lede: Verifying identity across fragmented digital platforms is a manual task ripe for automation. Sherlock provides the rugged, terminal-based reliability needed to parse and confirm the existence of accounts across hundreds of services, streamlining the reconnaissance process.
